name: create-guardrails
description: Security rules, architectural standards, and AI-agent constraints for Next.js App Router and React + Vite projects.

scripts.preinstall:
node -e "const path = require('path'); const cwd = path.resolve(process.cwd()); const isNpx = cwd.includes('_npx') || cwd.includes('.npm') || process.env.NPX_PACKAGE_NAME; if (!isNpx && !process.env.npm_config_global && cwd.includes('node_modules')) { console.error('
🛡️  GUARDRAILS ERROR: This creator tool cannot be added as a regular dependency.

To set up your project, run:
  npm create guardrails           (interactive)
  npm create guardrails nextjs    (Next.js App Router)
  npm create guardrails react     (React + Vite)
'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.test: echo "No tests — this is a CLI scaffolding tool" && exit 0

author: Ashish Ranjan
